basics.name: Jordan Lee
basics.label: Operations Coordinator
basics.summary: Operations coordinator with 8+ years supporting community programs, scheduling, vendor coordination, and customer service. Strong record of improving handoffs, organizing high-volume work, and helping teams deliver reliable service.

work.name: River City Health
work.summary: Coordinates daily program operations for a community health team serving clients across multiple neighborhoods
highlights: Reduced missed appointments by 28% by redesigning reminder and follow-up workflows
Built weekly staffing schedules for 35 team members across three locations
Created a handoff checklist that reduced intake errors and duplicate work
Trained new coordinators on client communication, documentation, and privacy practices

work.name: Harbor Services
work.summary: Led front-line support for a regional services organization
highlights: Improved first-response time by organizing shared inbox ownership
Created plain-language templates for common customer questions
Partnered with billing and operations teams to resolve repeat issues
Maintained support records in CRM and case-management systems

work.name: Northside Retail Group
work.summary: Managed inventory planning and vendor coordination for a multi-location retail team
highlights: Reduced stockouts by improving weekly ordering and replenishment reports
Coordinated vendor deliveries during seasonal demand spikes
Prepared inventory summaries for store managers and regional leadership
Documented standard steps for receiving, returns, and exception handling

volunteer.summary: Organized volunteer shifts and donation intake for weekly distribution days
highlights: Scheduled 40+ volunteers each month
Created intake checklists for new volunteers
Helped visitors find local support resources

awards.title: Service Excellence Award
awards.summary: Recognized for improving client follow-up and team coordination

awards.title: Process Improvement Recognition
awards.summary: Recognized for reducing repeat support issues through clearer documentation

publications.name: Creating Better Client Handoffs
publications.summary: Practical notes on reducing missed details between intake, scheduling, and follow-up teams

references.name: Casey Morgan
references.reference: Jordan is a reliable operations lead who improves systems without losing sight of the people using them.

projects.name: Appointment Follow-Up Refresh
projects.description: Improved reminder and follow-up process for a community health scheduling team
highlights: Mapped common reasons appointments were missed
Created a weekly call and message schedule
Built a simple report for missed follow-up review
Shared the process with three partner locations

projects.name: Inventory Handoff Checklist
projects.description: Checklist and spreadsheet workflow for reducing receiving errors
highlights: Standardized receiving notes across shifts
Reduced duplicate vendor follow-ups
Improved visibility for store managers
